mapper.insert: INSERT INTO skill (author_id, category_id, name, description, resource_url, status) VALUES (#{authorId}, #{categoryId}, #{name}, #{description}, #{resourceUrl}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT id, author_id, category_id, name, description, resource_url, status, created_at, updated_at FROM skill WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'published'

SELECT s.id, s.name, s.description, COALESCE(r.avg_rating, 0) AS avgRating, COALESCE(r.rating_count, 0) AS ratingCount FROM skill s LEFT JOIN ( SELECT skill_id, AVG(score) AS avg_rating, COUNT(1) AS rating_count FROM rating GROUP BY skill_id ) r ON r.skill_id = s.id WHERE s.status = 'published'
AND s.category_id = #{categoryId}
AND (s.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%') OR s.description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%'))
ORDER BY
s.name
s.updated_at
ASC
DESC
LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.update: UPDATE skill SET name = COALESCE(#{name}, name), description = COALESCE(#{description}, description), resource_url = COALESCE(#{resourceUrl}, resource_url) WHERE id = #{id}
